attributes.dataSource.name: Microsoft
attributes.dataSource.vendor: Azure Eventhub Defender Email for Cloud

metadata_details.purpose: Parser for Microsoft Eventhub defender emailforcloud logs using the OCSF mapping to normalise events into the AI-SIEM schema.
metadata_details.dependency_summary: Requires ingestion of the original Microsoft Eventhub defender emailforcloud logs.
metadata_details.performance_impact: Minimal – this parser is a placeholder pointing to the upstream definition.
metadata_details.tags: microsoft, eventhub defender emailforcloud, logs, ocsf, parser
metadata_details.author: Joel Mora

analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes Microsoft Defender for Email Cloud logs from Azure Event Hub, focusing on security assessments and events. It normalizes data about resource health, security scores, assessment details, and metadata into a standardized OCSF format for security analysis and monitoring.
optimization_opportunities: Add data validation for critical fields
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: microsoft_eventhub_defender_emailforcloud_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Security Assessment (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:10:13.606019

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_string(value)
    return type(value) == "string" and #value > 0
end

local function validate_number(value) 
    return type(value) == "number"
end

local function safe_get_nested(tbl, ...)
    local current = tbl
    for _, key in ipairs({...}) do
        if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end
        current = current[key]
    end
    return current
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with efficient table construction
    local output = {
        -- Required OCSF fields
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Security Assessment",
        category_uid = 1, 
        category_name = "Security Findings",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        
        -- Initialize nested tables
        metadata = {},
        score = {},
        status = {},
        resource = {},
        assessment = {},
        event = {}
    }

    -- Efficient field mapping with validation
    local props = record.properties
    if props then
        -- Metadata mapping
        if props.metadata then
            local metadata = props.metadata
            if validate_string(metadata.severity) then
                output.metadata.severity = metadata.severity
            end
            
            -- Additional metadata fields
            output.metadata.description = metadata.description
            output.metadata.implementation_effort = metadata.implementationEffort
            output.metadata.preview = metadata.preview
            output.metadata.weight = metadata.weight
        end

        -- Score mapping
        if props.score then
            local score = props.score
            if validate_number(score.current) then
                output.score.current = score.current
            end
            output.score.maximum = score.max
            output.score.percentage = score.percentage
        end

        -- Status mapping
        if props.status then
            local status = props.status
            output.status.code = status.code
            output.status.first_valuation_date = status.firstEvaluationDate
            output.status.change_date = status.statusChangeDate
        end

        -- Resource mapping
        output.resource = {
            healthy_resource_count = props.healthyResourceCount,
            unhealthy_resource_count = props.unhealthyResourceCount,
            not_applicable_resource_count = props.notApplicableResourceCount,
            passed = props.passedResources,
            failed = props.failedResources,
            skipped = props.skippedResources
        }
    end

    -- Timestamp handling
    output.time = record.time or (os_time() * 1000)

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

monitoring_recommendations: Alert on memory usage spikes (>80% capacity)
Log invalid field mappings for analysis
